price: Ta-Sin. Dies sind die Zeichen des Qur’ans und eines deutlichen Buches,
arabic: طسٓۚ تِلۡكَ ءَايَٰتُ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِ وَكِتَابٖ مُّبِينٍ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: tta-seen til'ka āyātu al-qur'āni wakitābin mubīnin
